# CPA Field Guide — full index
> Independent, vendor-neutral directory of US tax & accounting software for CPA and accounting firms. Every tool is defined, priced, and rated for how open it is to integration. No vendor pays for placement. Reviewed 2026-07-22.

## Key pages
- Home: https://cpafieldguide.com/
- Compare all tools (table): https://cpafieldguide.com/compare
- Tax Preparation: https://cpafieldguide.com/tax-preparation-software
- Deadline & Compliance Tracking: https://cpafieldguide.com/deadline-monitoring-software
- Practice Management: https://cpafieldguide.com/practice-management-software
- Accounting & Bookkeeping: https://cpafieldguide.com/accounting-software

## Guides
- CPA & accounting software with an open API: https://cpafieldguide.com/cpa-software-with-open-api
- Best software for solo CPA firms: https://cpafieldguide.com/best-cpa-software-for-solo-firms
- Best software for small CPA firms: https://cpafieldguide.com/best-cpa-software-for-small-firms

## Comparisons
- TaxDome vs Canopy: https://cpafieldguide.com/taxdome-vs-canopy
- Karbon vs TaxDome: https://cpafieldguide.com/karbon-vs-taxdome

- QuickBooks Online vs Xero: https://cpafieldguide.com/quickbooks-online-vs-xero
- Drake Tax vs UltraTax CS: https://cpafieldguide.com/drake-tax-vs-ultratax-cs
- Lacerte vs ProSeries: https://cpafieldguide.com/lacerte-vs-proseries
- ProConnect vs ProSeries: https://cpafieldguide.com/proconnect-vs-proseries
- Lacerte vs ProConnect: https://cpafieldguide.com/lacerte-vs-proconnect
- Drake Tax vs Lacerte: https://cpafieldguide.com/drake-tax-vs-lacerte
- Drake Tax vs ProSeries: https://cpafieldguide.com/drake-tax-vs-proseries

- ATX vs Drake Tax: https://cpafieldguide.com/atx-vs-drake-tax

## Tools (full detail)
### Drake Tax
- Page: https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/drake-tax
- Official site: https://www.drakesoftware.com
- Category: Tax Preparation
- Best for: Solo firms
- Pricing: From $2,145/yr
- Integration: Export only — It has no public API; data moves in and out by file export.
- Adoption: 16.3% share
- Summary: 
            Full 1040 and business tax-prep suite — the high-volume, low-cost favorite of sole
            practitioners.
          

### Lacerte
- Page: https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/lacerte
- Official site: https://accountants.intuit.com/tax/lacerte/
- Category: Tax Preparation
- Best for: Small · mid firms
- Pricing: Custom · per-return
- Integration: Local SDK — It has no public API; data moves in and out by file export.
- Adoption: 15.8% share
- Summary: 
            Intuit's high-end desktop tax software for complex individual and business returns.
          

### ProConnect
- Page: https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/proconnect
- Official site: https://accountants.intuit.com/tax/proconnect/
- Category: Tax Preparation
- Best for: Solo · small firms
- Pricing: Pay-per-return
- Integration: No API yet — It has no public API; data moves in and out by file export.
- Adoption: 3.8% share
- Summary: 
            Intuit's cloud professional tax prep, tied into QuickBooks Online Accountant.
          

### ProSeries
- Page: https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/proseries
- Official site: https://accountants.intuit.com/tax/proseries/
- Category: Tax Preparation
- Best for: Small firms
- Pricing: From $419/yr
- Integration: Export only — It has no public API; data moves in and out by file export.
- Adoption: 10.5% share
- Summary: Intuit's desktop tax suite for higher-volume 1040 practices.

### UltraTax CS
- Page: https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/ultratax-cs
- Official site: https://tax.thomsonreuters.com/us/en/cs-professional-suite/ultratax-cs
- Category: Tax Preparation
- Best for: Mid · large firms
- Pricing: Custom quote
- Integration: Export only — It has no public API; data moves in and out by file export.
- Adoption: 22.9% share
- Summary: 
            Thomson Reuters' tax engine for mid-to-large firms; anchor of the CS Professional Suite.
          

### CCH Axcess
- Page: https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/cch-axcess
- Official site: https://www.wolterskluwer.com/en/solutions/cch-axcess/tax
- Category: Tax Preparation
- Best for: Mid · enterprise firms
- Pricing: From $2,299/yr
- Integration: Partner API — It has an API, but access is gated behind approval, a partner program, or a higher plan.
- Adoption: 12.5% share
- Summary: 
            Wolters Kluwer's cloud tax, document, and workflow suite for larger firms.
          

### ATX
- Page: https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/atx
- Official site: https://www.wolterskluwer.com/en/solutions/atx
- Category: Tax Preparation
- Best for: Solo · small firms
- Pricing: From $939/yr
- Integration: Export only — It has no public API; data moves in and out by file export.
- Adoption: 4.6% share
- Summary: 
            Wolters Kluwer's budget, forms-based tax software for smaller practices.
          

### File In Time
- Page: https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/file-in-time
- Official site: https://www.timevalue.com/file-in-time
- Category: Deadline & Compliance Tracking
- Best for: Solo · small firms
- Pricing: Paid license
- Integration: Export only — It has no public API; data moves in and out by file export.
- Summary: 
            Records client due dates and rolls them forward each year — a classic passive tracker.
          

### DueDateHQ
- Page: https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/duedatehq
- Official site: https://duedatehq.com
- Category: Deadline & Compliance Tracking
- Best for: Solo · small firms
- Pricing: Free · beta
- Integration: No API yet — It has no public API yet.
- Summary: 
            Monitors the IRS, states, and FEMA and flags which clients a filing-date change hits.
            Free in beta.
          

### ONESOURCE Calendar
- Page: https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/onesource-calendar
- Official site: https://tax.thomsonreuters.com/en/onesource/workflow-manager/calendar
- Category: Deadline & Compliance Tracking
- Best for: Mid · enterprise firms
- Pricing: Custom quote
- Integration: Gated API — It has an API, but access is gated behind approval, a partner program, or a higher plan.
- Summary: 
            Thomson Reuters' enterprise compliance calendar for multi-entity tax deadlines.
          

### Karbon
- Page: https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/karbon
- Official site: https://karbonhq.com
- Category: Practice Management
- Best for: Small · mid firms
- Pricing: From $59/user/mo
- Integration: Open API — It offers a self-serve public API, so it is among the easiest tools here to connect to.
- Summary: 
            All-in-one practice management — workflow, email, and billing — with the category's
            deepest API.
          

### TaxDome
- Page: https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/taxdome
- Official site: https://taxdome.com
- Category: Practice Management
- Best for: Solo · mid firms
- Pricing: From $67/user/mo
- Integration: Open API — It offers a self-serve public API, so it is among the easiest tools here to connect to.
- Adoption: 10,000+ firms
- Summary: 
            All-in-one practice management with a client portal, e-signature, and invoicing.
          

### Canopy
- Page: https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/canopy
- Official site: https://www.getcanopy.com
- Category: Practice Management
- Best for: Small · mid firms
- Pricing: From $45/user/mo
- Integration: Gated API — It has an API, but access is gated behind approval, a partner program, or a higher plan.
- Summary: Modular practice management: CRM, workflow, documents, and billing.

### Financial Cents
- Page: https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/financial-cents
- Official site: https://financial-cents.com
- Category: Practice Management
- Best for: Solo · small firms
- Pricing: From $19/user/mo
- Integration: Gated API — It has an API, but access is gated behind approval, a partner program, or a higher plan.
- Summary: 
            Lightweight workflow and client management with recurring tasks and a portal.
          

### Jetpack Workflow
- Page: https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/jetpack-workflow
- Official site: https://jetpackworkflow.com
- Category: Practice Management
- Best for: Solo · small firms
- Pricing: From $36/user/mo
- Integration: Gated API — It has an API, but access is gated behind approval, a partner program, or a higher plan.
- Summary: Simple recurring-job and deadline tracking built for small firms.

### Keeper
- Page: https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/keeper
- Official site: https://doublehq.com
- Category: Practice Management
- Best for: Solo · small firms
- Pricing: From $200/mo
- Integration: Zapier only — It has no direct API; it connects to other tools through Zapier.
- Summary: 
            Month-end close and bookkeeping workflow with a two-way QuickBooks sync. Rebranded to Double in late 2025 — same product and pricing.
          

### Firm360
- Page: https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/firm360
- Official site: https://www.myfirm360.com
- Category: Practice Management
- Best for: Small · mid firms
- Pricing: From $49/user/mo
- Integration: Zapier only — It has no direct API; it connects to other tools through Zapier.
- Summary: 
            All-in-one practice management — projects, documents, billing, and a portal.
          

### Pixie
- Page: https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/pixie
- Official site: https://www.usepixie.com
- Category: Practice Management
- Best for: Solo · small firms
- Pricing: From $129/mo
- Integration: Zapier only — It has no direct API; it connects to other tools through Zapier.
- Summary: 
            Simple practice management for small firms: client database, jobs, and email.
          

### Aiwyn
- Page: https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/aiwyn
- Official site: https://www.aiwyn.ai
- Category: Practice Management
- Best for: Mid · enterprise firms
- Pricing: Custom · enterprise
- Integration: Partner API — It has an API, but access is gated behind approval, a partner program, or a higher plan.
- Summary: 
            Billing and revenue-cycle automation for large firms, layered on existing systems.
          

### Ignition
- Page: https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/ignition
- Official site: https://www.ignitionapp.com
- Category: Practice Management
- Best for: Solo · mid firms
- Pricing: From $39/mo
- Integration: Zapier only — It has no direct API; it connects to other tools through Zapier.
- Summary: 
            Proposals, engagement letters, and automated billing for accounting firms.
          

### QuickBooks Online
- Page: https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/quickbooks-online
- Official site: https://quickbooks.intuit.com
- Category: Accounting & Bookkeeping
- Best for: Solo · mid firms
- Pricing: From $35/mo
- Integration: Open API — It offers a self-serve public API, so it is among the easiest tools here to connect to.
- Summary: 
            The dominant US small-business ledger — the book of record most firms work from.
          

### Xero
- Page: https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/xero
- Official site: https://www.xero.com
- Category: Accounting & Bookkeeping
- Best for: Solo · mid firms
- Pricing: From $25/mo
- Integration: Open API — It offers a self-serve public API, so it is among the easiest tools here to connect to.
- Summary: 
            Cloud accounting ledger, strong internationally, with a broad app ecosystem.
          

### Bill.com
- Page: https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/bill-com
- Official site: https://www.bill.com
- Category: Accounting & Bookkeeping
- Best for: Small · mid firms
- Pricing: From $45/user/mo
- Integration: Open API — It offers a self-serve public API, so it is among the easiest tools here to connect to.
- Summary: AP/AR automation and payments for firms and their clients.

### Sage
- Page: https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/sage
- Official site: https://www.sage.com
- Category: Accounting & Bookkeeping
- Best for: Small · enterprise firms
- Pricing: From ~$10/mo
- Integration: Gated API — It has an API, but access is gated behind approval, a partner program, or a higher plan.
- Summary: 
            Accounting from small business (Sage Accounting) to mid-market (Sage Intacct).
          

### ProAdvisor
- Page: https://cpafieldguide.com/tools/proadvisor
- Official site: https://quickbooks.intuit.com/accountants/proadvisor/
- Category: Accounting & Bookkeeping
- Best for: Channel firms
- Pricing: Free · program
- Integration: Partner API — It offers a self-serve public API, so it is among the easiest tools here to connect to.
- Adoption: 500k+ members
- Summary: 
            Intuit's free accountant program around QuickBooks — discounts, training, and firm
            tools.
